name: google-antigravity-codex
description: Independent Codex plugin and MCP tools for Google Antigravity OAuth, chat, grounded search, writing, release drafting, image generation, model routing, and quota status.

interface.shortDescription: Use Google Antigravity directly from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Google Antigravity Codex provides an independent Codex plugin plus MCP stdio server for Antigravity OAuth, chat, native Google Search grounding with evidence, writing, release drafting, image generation, model listing, model routing, retry diagnostics, and quota status. It also includes the useful Codex-facing workflows from Google Grounded Search Copilot, Gemini Writing Copilot, and Release Copilot.
defaultPrompt: Use Google-grounded search for this current fact.
Draft release notes from the current repo.
Generate an image through Google Antigravity.
Route this task to the best Antigravity model.
